meta.title: About · Hireeo
meta.description: Hireeo builds infrastructure for the trades that hold up daily life. Founded in Castro, Chiloé in 2024.

hero.title: Building infrastructure for the trades that hold up daily life.
hero.subtitle: Hireeo was born in Castro, Chiloé, in 2024. A conversation between a plumber without clients and a programmer with a broken boiler. The question was: why is it so hard to find each other?

items.title: Trade on the cover
items.desc: Every profile shows finished work. We don't sell stock photos, we sell results.

items.title: No commission on jobs
items.desc: The job's money never goes through us. The economic relationship is between client and pro.

items.title: Made in LATAM
items.desc: Local gateway, local currency, local language. We're not a translated product — we think in Spanish.

items.title: Data as a product, not merchandise
items.desc: We don't sell user data. Decisions are made with aggregate, anonymous metrics.

items.title: Verification is mandatory
items.desc: Identity, references and background checked by hand by our operations team.

items.title: Small by choice
items.desc: Team of 18. We grow slow, we listen fast.
